name: Halloween Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions: Beat butter and sugar in mixer until creamy. Beat in eggs, one at a time, then add vanilla. Combine flour, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl and beat into the butter mixture. Add a small amount of orange paste food coloring with a toothpick and beat at low speed until the dough is evenly colored. Form the dough into walnut-sized balls and place 2 inches apart on a lightly greased baking sheet. Flatten each ball gently with the palm of your hand, then press with fork tines to make a grid pattern. Top with chocolate sprinkles and bake at 375°F for 10-12 minutes. Makes about 2 dozen cookies. Each cookie contains about: 116 calories; 87 mg sodium; 28 mg cholesterol; 4 grams fat; 17 grams carbohydrates; 2 grams protein; 0.04 gram fiber.
